title: EvaluationVerdict
description: Output of a single L5 evaluator. One CompletedTask produces N EvaluationVerdicts (one per evaluator). The L6 Critic ingests the full set.

evaluator.description: Canonical evaluator slug. New evaluators must be added here AND to /agents/README.md §5 in the same PR.

blocking.description: If true, a fail here MUST block the Critic from approving. tenant_isolation and red_team are always blocking regardless of risk_tier.

evidence_url.description: Link to CI run / eval report / artefact.

evidence.description: Structured payload (e.g. failing test names, perf numbers, axe-core violations). Free-form per evaluator.
